notes: LinxISA v0.57 defines the current Linx block descriptor contract.
B.ITP and B.OTA encode 8-bit TileReg ids, with TZERO reserved as source-only id 0x00.
B.OTA encodes destination allocation size as an 8-bit CellCountM1 field in 128-byte CELL units.
B.META names an ordinary GPR metadata operand for TEPL/TMA element-domain shape, valid-region, and mask state.
